case_title: BERNARD ELYSSA VS MARTINEZ RICHARD JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERNARD ELYSSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ RICHARD JR. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,245.00, DEF TO PAY PLFT $2000. PLUS 10% ON 4/15/93. JUDGE- MENT WILL BE STAYED UNTIL THAT DATE, IF NOT PAID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
